notes: Companion to post_health_check_unknown.json — documents the response shape when the production server has the token in its DB.

Schematic fixture (placeholder hashes): production is read-only from outside, so we cannot mint a known unspent token to capture a real byte stream. The shape is documented in webylib/docs/PROTOCOL.md and used by the wallet's recover() — without an `amount` field on `spent: false`, recovery silently drops funds.
spent: false → amount: "<decimal>"   (unspent; wallet recovers this value)
spent: true  → amount: null            (spent; no amount returned)
spent: null  → no amount key           (unknown; per post_health_check_unknown.json)
Decimal stringification matches /api/v1/target: trailing zeros stripped (`1`, not `1.00000000`).
